title: API and Coordinates
text: sassy_search() convenience wrapper one-calls. sassy_searcher() creates reusable searcher. sassy_searcher_search() searches reusable searcher. sassy_search_connection() streams R connection. sassy_features() reports selected backend CPU/build features. sassy_set_backend() requests backend first native call.

title: API and Coordinates
text: Match coordinates 0-based half-open: text_start, text_end describe interval input text. pattern_start, pattern_end describe interval input pattern. pattern_idx, text_idx 0-based indices vector/list inputs. mirrors Rust crate avoids repeated conversion native boundary.
code: matches <- sassy_search("ACGT", "TTACGTAA", k = 0, alphabet = "dna", rc = FALSE) matches[, c("text_start", "text_end", "pattern_start", "pattern_end", "cigar")]

title: API and Coordinates
text: pattern text can character vectors, raw vectors, lists raw vectors / character scalars. Use raw vectors input already byte-oriented pass R string encoding.
code: sassy_search(charToRaw("ACGT"), charToRaw("TTACGTAA"), k = 0, alphabet = "dna")

title: API and Coordinates
text: Set match_region = TRUE include matched text interval. Reverse-strand regions reverse-complemented region CIGAR input pattern direction.
code: sassy_search(   "ATCGATCG",   "GGGGATCGATCGTTTT",   k = 1,   alphabet = "dna",   match_region = TRUE )

title: API and Coordinates
text: mode = "single" searches pattern/text pair independently. mode = "batch_texts", mode = "batch_patterns", mode = "encoded_patterns" expose Sassy’s batched paths applicable. batched pattern modes currently require equal pattern byte lengths IUPAC profile.

title: Backend Selection
text: default "auto" setting, Rsassy chooses best installed backend supported current runtime: WebAssembly SIMD128 wasm builds AVX-512 supported x86_64 machines AVX2 supported x86_64 machines NEON supported arm64 machines scalar fallback Inspect installed package :
code: features <- sassy_features() features[c(   "rsassy_dispatch",   "rsassy_selected_backend",   "rsassy_installed_backends",   "rsassy_supported_backends" )]

title: Backend Selection
text: Use sassy_set_backend() first native Rsassy call benchmarking debugging specific backend. Backend loading intentionally one-shot. Rsassy unload reload native backend DLLs -process portable across R platforms. Benchmark different backends separate fresh Rscript processes.
code: library(Rsassy) sassy_set_backend("scalar") sassy_features()$rsassy_selected_backend

title: Backend Selection
text: upstream sassy crate selects SIMD behavior crate/build-level configuration SIMD-dependent types. makes single function-pointer multiversioning layer harder small demos every backend explicit leaf function. current package therefore uses separate backend libraries native platforms static Rust path webR/wasm.

title: Searching R Connections
text: returned coordinates relative full stream, individual chunks.
code: tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".gz") con <- gzfile(tmp, "wb") writeBin(charToRaw("CCCCATGCCCCTTT"), con) close(con)  con <- gzfile(tmp, "rb") sassy_search_connection(   c("ATG", "TTT"),   con,   k = 1,   alphabet = "iupac",   rc = FALSE,   mode = "encoded_patterns" ) close(con) unlink(tmp)

title: Searching R Connections
text: chunk_size controls many new bytes read per native chunk. overlap = NULL, C shim computes conservative overlap longest pattern, k, overhang setting. Open compressed connections, gzfile(), binary mode possible.
code: con <- rawConnection(charToRaw("AAAAACGTAAAA"), "rb") sassy_search_connection(   "ACGT",   con,   k = 0,   alphabet = "dna",   rc = FALSE,   chunk_size = 6 ) close(con)

title: Getting Started with Rsassy
text: Install r-universe: checkout install resolves sassy Rust crate crates.io:
code: install.packages(   "Rsassy",   repos = c("https://sounkou-bioinfo.r-universe.dev", "https://cloud.r-project.org") ) R CMD INSTALL .

title: Getting Started with Rsassy
text: result sassy_matches data frame. Coordinates 0-based half-open, following Rust library.
code: library(Rsassy)  sassy_search(   pattern = "ATCGATCG",   text = "GGGGATCGATCGTTTT",   k = 1,   alphabet = "dna" )

title: Getting Started with Rsassy
text: Create searcher multiple calls share alphabet reverse-complement behavior:
code: searcher <- sassy_searcher("dna", rc = TRUE) sassy_searcher_search(searcher, "ATCGATCG", "GGGGATCGATCGTTTT", k = 1)

title: Getting Started with Rsassy
text: Character vectors search every pattern every text. pattern_idx text_idx columns identify 0-based input indices.
code: sassy_search(   c("ATG", "TTT"),   "CCCCATGCCCCTTT",   k = 1,   alphabet = "iupac",   rc = FALSE,   mode = "encoded_patterns" )

title: Source Installation and Vendoring
text: normal checkout install may resolve Rust crates crates.io: package build uses R’s standard native build hooks: configure / configure.win generate src/Makevars files. src/Makevars./ src/Makevars.win.build Rust backend libraries. src/install.libs.R installs backend libraries backends/ rather R’s main libs/ directory. cleanup removes generated build artifacts.
code: R CMD INSTALL .

title: Source Installation and Vendoring
text: CRAN-style source package builds depend network access installation. building release tarball target, vendor Rust crates explicitly: make vendor-rust writes: files generated release artifacts. intentionally tracked development repository default.
code: make vendor-rust R CMD build . src/rust/vendor.tar.xz inst/AUTHORS inst/LICENCE.note

title: Source Installation and Vendoring
text: make check uses conservative Cargo job count suitable shared check machines. local development, increase explicitly:
code: make CARGO_JOBS=10 check

what: R Bindings to the sassy Approximate String Matcher
title: R Bindings to the sassy Approximate String Matcher
text: R bindings Sassy R’s native C API. Results returned data frames 0-based coordinates CIGAR strings.

title: R Bindings to the sassy Approximate String Matcher
text: Install r-universe: Source installs require Cargo/rustc >= 1.91 xz. checkout: Checkout installs resolve sassy Rust crate crates.io. CRAN/offline source packages, run make vendor-rust R CMD build add src/rust/vendor.tar.xz; generated bundle committed default. Native Rsassy builds multiversion default: x86_64 builds install scalar, AVX2, AVX-512 backends; arm64 builds install scalar NEON backends. Rsassy selects best installed backend supported current CPU/runtime native backend first loaded. webR/WebAssembly builds use wasm32-unknown-emscripten SIMD128.
code: install.packages(   "Rsassy",   repos = c("https://sounkou-bioinfo.r-universe.dev", "https://cloud.r-project.org") ) R CMD INSTALL .

title: R Bindings to the sassy Approximate String Matcher
text: result sassy_matches data frame pattern_idx, text_idx, text_start, text_end, pattern_start, pattern_end, cost, strand, cigar. Coordinates 0-based half-open. Set match_region = TRUE also want matched sequence. strand == "-", match_region reverse-complemented direction input pattern CIGAR. print method can color match_region simple ANSI escape sequences, following CLI sassy grep alignment legend: green matching characters, orange mismatches, blue inserted text characters, red gaps pattern characters absent text. Coloring default meant ANSI-capable interactive terminals. Reuse searcher making repeated calls: Vector inputs search every pattern every text. Native builds can use Rust/Rayon threads. current Rsassy wasm32/webR build path keeps API runs bulk loop serially threaded webR execution explicitly enabled validated. mode = "encoded_patterns" (alias "v2") R equivalent CLI --v2 many equal-length short patterns. mode = "batch_patterns" mode = "encoded_patterns" currently require alphabet = "iupac" equal pattern byte lengths. Connections can searched without R-level read loop return match columns stream-relative coordinates: Inspect installed build: Backend loading one-shot per R process. need benchmark debug specific backend, call sassy_set_backend() first native Rsassy call fresh Rscript process. See vignette("backend-selection", package = "Rsassy") details.
code: library(Rsassy)  sassy_search("ATCGATCG", "GGGGATCGATCGTTTT", k = 1, alphabet = "dna") #> <sassy_matches> 3 matches #> pattern_idx text_idx text_start text_end pattern_start pattern_end cost strand  cigar #>           0        0          4       12             0           8    0      +     8= #>           0        0          6       14             0           8    1      - 1=1X6= #>           0        0          2       10             0           8    1      -   7=1X region_matches <- sassy_search(   "ATCGATCG",   "GGGGATCGATCGTTTT",   k = 1,   alphabet = "dna",   match_region = TRUE ) region_matches #> <sassy_matches> 3 matches #> pattern_idx text_idx text_start text_end pattern_start pattern_end cost strand  cigar match_region #>           0        0          4       12             0           8    0      +     8=     ATCGATCG #>           0        0          6       14             0           8    1      - 1=1X6=     AACGATCG #>           0        0          2       10             0           8    1      -   7=1X     ATCGATCC searcher <- sassy_searcher("dna") sassy_searcher_search(searcher, "ATCGATCG", "GGGGATCGATCGTTTT", k = 1) #> <sassy_matches> 3 matches #> pattern_idx text_idx text_start text_end pattern_start pattern_end cost strand  cigar #>           0        0          4       12             0           8    0      +     8= #>           0        0          6       14             0           8    1      - 1=1X6= #>           0        0          2       10             0           8    1      -   7=1X sassy_search(   c("ATG", "TTT"),   "CCCCATGCCCCTTT",   k = 1,   alphabet = "iupac",   rc = FALSE,   mode = "encoded_patterns" ) #> <sassy_matches> 2 matches #> pattern_idx text_idx text_start text_end pattern_start pattern_end cost strand cigar #>           0        0          4        7             0           3    0      +    3= #>           1        0         11       14             0           3    0      +    3= tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".gz") con <- gzfile(tmp, "wb") writeBin(charToRaw("CCCCATGCCCCTTT"), con) close(con)  con <- gzfile(tmp, "rb") sassy_search_connection(c("ATG", "TTT"), con, k = 1, alphabet = "iupac", rc = FALSE, mode = "encoded_patterns") #> <sassy_matches> 2 matches #> pattern_idx text_idx text_start text_end pattern_start pattern_end cost strand cigar #>           0        0          4        7             0           3    0      +    3= #>           1        0         11       14             0           3    0      +    3= close(con) unlink(tmp) sassy_features() #> <sassy_features> #> dispatch: dynamic #> selected backend: avx2 #> installed backends: scalar, avx2, avx512 #> supported backends: scalar, avx2 #> CPU: avx2=yes avx512f=no neon=no #> Rust backend: avx2 (native_simd=yes)

title: R Bindings to the sassy Approximate String Matcher
text: standalone Rsassy repository root: Useful targets include make readme, make rd, make install, make test, make vendor-rust, make clean. make check uses CRAN-safe default two Cargo build jobs; use make check-fast make CARGO_JOBS=10 check local multithreaded Cargo builds.
code: make check

title: Print sassy match data frames — print.sassy_matches
text: x sassy_matches data frame. ... Ignored; accepted compatibility print(). color TRUE, color match_region CIGAR operation ANSI escape sequences: green matches, orange substitutions, blue inserted text, red gaps pattern bases absent text. Defaults getOption("Rsassy.coloring", FALSE).

title: Print sassy match data frames — print.sassy_matches

what: Report Rsassy build and CPU feature information — sassy_features
title: Report Rsassy build and CPU feature information — sassy_features
text: Returns diagnostic information selected Rsassy backend. Calling initializes native backend already loaded. rsassy_selected_backend reports runtime-selected backend. rsassy_installed_backends character vector backend libraries found package installation, rsassy_supported_backends subset supported current CPU/runtime. "auto" selection, Rsassy chooses best supported installed backend: AVX-512 AVX2 x86_64, NEON arm64, WebAssembly SIMD128 wasm, scalar otherwise. selected_* fields describe loaded Rust backend. cpu_* fields detected C shim.

title: Report Rsassy build and CPU feature information — sassy_features
code: sassy_features()

title: Report Rsassy build and CPU feature information — sassy_features
text: sassy_features list build, selected-backend, CPU/runtime feature values.

title: Report Rsassy build and CPU feature information — sassy_features
code: sassy_features() #> <sassy_features> #> dispatch: dynamic #> selected backend: avx2 #> installed backends: scalar, avx2, avx512 #> supported backends: scalar, avx2 #> CPU: avx2=yes avx512f=no neon=no #> Rust backend: avx2 (native_simd=yes)

title: Search approximate matches with 'sassy' — sassy_search
text: Convenience wrapper creates searcher, searches, returns sassy_matches data frame. Coordinates 0-based half-open.

title: Search approximate matches with 'sassy' — sassy_search
code: sassy_search(   pattern,   text,   k,   alphabet = "dna",   rc = TRUE,   alpha = NULL,   all = FALSE,   threads = 1L,   mode = "single",   match_region = FALSE )

title: Search approximate matches with 'sassy' — sassy_search
text: pattern, text Raw vectors, character vectors, lists raw vectors / character scalars. k Maximum edit distance. alphabet Alphabet profile. One "dna", "iupac", "ascii". rc TRUE, search reverse-complement strand well supported. alpha Optional IUPAC overhang cost [0, 1]. Use NULL disable. FALSE, return local-minimum matches. TRUE, return end positions score <= k. threads Number Rust/Rayon worker threads native bulk searches. current Rsassy wasm32/webR build path runs serially. mode Bulk search mode. "single" searches pair independently; "batch_texts" uses one text per SIMD lane; "batch_patterns" uses one pattern per SIMD lane currently requires alphabet = "iupac" plus equal pattern lengths; "encoded_patterns" (alias "v2") uses Sassy's encoded-pattern path currently also requires alphabet = "iupac" plus equal pattern lengths. match_region TRUE, include match_region column. Reverse-strand regions reverse-complemented region CIGAR input pattern direction.

title: Search approximate matches with 'sassy' — sassy_search
text: data frame 0-based indices coordinates: pattern_idx, text_idx, text_start, text_end, pattern_start, pattern_end, cost, strand, cigar. requested, also includes match_region.

title: Search approximate matches with 'sassy' — sassy_search
code: sassy_search("ACGT", "TTACGTAA", 0, alphabet = "dna", rc = FALSE) #> <sassy_matches> 1 match #> pattern_idx text_idx text_start text_end pattern_start pattern_end cost strand cigar #>           0        0          2        6             0           4    0      +    4=

what: Search an R connection with 'sassy' — sassy_search_connection
title: Search an R connection with 'sassy' — sassy_search_connection
text: Streams bytes already-open readable R connection C/R API boundary. avoids R-level readBin()/readChar() loop still preserving matches cross chunk boundaries keeping overlap window. pattern may single sequence vector/list sequences, pattern_idx identifying 0-based input pattern index.

title: Search an R connection with 'sassy' — sassy_search_connection
code: sassy_search_connection(   pattern,   con,   k,   alphabet = "dna",   rc = TRUE,   alpha = NULL,   all = FALSE,   threads = 1L,   mode = "single",   chunk_size = 1024 * 1024,   overlap = NULL,   match_region = FALSE )

title: Search an R connection with 'sassy' — sassy_search_connection
text: pattern Raw vector, character vector, list raw vectors / character scalars. con open readable R connection, preferably opened binary mode. k Maximum edit distance. alphabet Alphabet profile. One "dna", "iupac", "ascii". rc TRUE, search reverse-complement strand well supported. alpha Optional IUPAC overhang cost [0, 1]. Use NULL disable. FALSE, return local-minimum matches. TRUE, return end positions score <= k. threads Number Rust/Rayon worker threads native bulk searches. current Rsassy wasm32/webR build path runs serially. mode Bulk search mode. "single" searches pair independently; "batch_texts" uses one text per SIMD lane; "batch_patterns" uses one pattern per SIMD lane currently requires alphabet = "iupac" plus equal pattern lengths; "encoded_patterns" (alias "v2") uses Sassy's encoded-pattern path currently also requires alphabet = "iupac" plus equal pattern lengths. chunk_size Number new bytes read per native chunk. overlap Number bytes carry one chunk next. NULL, C computes default longest pattern, k, alpha. match_region TRUE, include match_region column. Reverse-strand regions reverse-complemented region CIGAR input pattern direction.

title: Search an R connection with 'sassy' — sassy_search_connection
text: data frame matches coordinates relative full stream.

code: sassy_searcher(alphabet = "dna", rc = TRUE, alpha = NULL)

title: Create a reusable 'sassy' searcher — sassy_searcher
text: alphabet Alphabet profile. One "dna", "iupac", "ascii". rc TRUE, search reverse-complement strand well supported. alpha Optional IUPAC overhang cost [0, 1]. Use NULL disable.

title: Create a reusable 'sassy' searcher — sassy_searcher
text: external pointer class sassy_searcher.

what: Search with a reusable 'sassy' searcher — sassy_searcher_search

text: pattern text may single sequences vectors/lists sequences. vectors supplied, every pattern searched every text returned pattern_idx text_idx columns identify 0-based input indices. Native builds can use Rayon threads bulk search threads > 1; current Rsassy wasm32/webR build path keeps API runs bulk loop serially threaded webR execution explicitly enabled validated.

title: Search with a reusable 'sassy' searcher — sassy_searcher_search
code: sassy_searcher_search(   searcher,   pattern,   text,   k,   all = FALSE,   threads = 1L,   mode = "single",   match_region = FALSE )

title: Search with a reusable 'sassy' searcher — sassy_searcher_search
text: searcher searcher created sassy_searcher(). pattern, text Raw vectors, character vectors, lists raw vectors / character scalars. k Maximum edit distance. FALSE, return local-minimum matches. TRUE, return end positions score <= k. threads Number Rust/Rayon worker threads native bulk searches. current Rsassy wasm32/webR build path runs serially. mode Bulk search mode. "single" searches pair independently; "batch_texts" uses one text per SIMD lane; "batch_patterns" uses one pattern per SIMD lane currently requires alphabet = "iupac" plus equal pattern lengths; "encoded_patterns" (alias "v2") uses Sassy's encoded-pattern path currently also requires alphabet = "iupac" plus equal pattern lengths. match_region TRUE, include match_region column. Reverse-strand regions reverse-complemented region CIGAR input pattern direction.

title: Search with a reusable 'sassy' searcher — sassy_searcher_search
text: data frame 0-based indices coordinates: pattern_idx, text_idx, text_start, text_end, pattern_start, pattern_end, cost, strand, cigar. requested, also includes match_region.

what: Select the Rsassy native backend — sassy_set_backend
title: Select the Rsassy native backend — sassy_set_backend
text: Select backend current R process. Backend loading intentionally one-shot: selected shared library fixed lifetime R process. must called first native Rsassy operation, including sassy_features(), sassy_searcher(), sassy_search(). Rsassy unload replace backend DLLs reliable across R platforms. Use benchmarking installed backends separate fresh R processes.

title: Select the Rsassy native backend — sassy_set_backend
code: sassy_set_backend(   backend = c("auto", "scalar", "avx2", "avx512", "neon", "wasm_simd128") )

title: Select the Rsassy native backend — sassy_set_backend
text: backend One "auto", "scalar", "avx2", "avx512", "neon", "wasm_simd128".

title: Select the Rsassy native backend — sassy_set_backend
text: requested backend name, invisibly. "auto" means runtime dispatch choose best installed backend supported current CPU/runtime backend first loaded.

title: Rsassy 0.2.1-0.1.0.9000
text: Added webR/WebAssembly package check CI. Built webR packages static Rust FFI symbols wasm_simd128. x86_64: scalar, AVX2, AVX-512. arm64/aarch64: scalar, NEON. automatic best-backend selection first native call; explicit sassy_set_backend() first native call. Added sassy_features() fields installed backends, selected backend, compiled features, CPU/runtime capabilities. Added CRAN-style Rust vendoring offline Cargo vendor tarball. Added CRAN-safe default Cargo parallelism local fast Makefile targets. Added vector bulk search support sassy_searcher_search(), sassy_search(), sassy_search_connection(). Added bulk modes "single", "batch_texts", "batch_patterns", "encoded_patterns"/"v2". Added native Rust/Rayon threading bulk search; wasm32 remains serial. Added match_region = TRUE; reverse-strand regions returned pattern direction. Added class sassy_matches print.sassy_matches(). Added optional ANSI coloring printed match regions. Added R connection input sassy_search_connection(). Added result columns pattern_idx, text_idx, text_start, text_end, pattern_start, pattern_end, cost, strand, cigar. Added R API functions sassy_searcher(), sassy_searcher_search(), sassy_search(). Added configure checks Cargo rustc >= 1.91.0. Added bundled Rust crate authorship license notes.
